positive: A stylized minimalist depiction of a celestial gradient sky meeting rolling hills. The composition features a large, abstract crescent moon glowing softly, surrounded by constellations formed by thin, glowing geometric lines. Below, silhouettes of abstract, stylized mountains and gentle flora (like palm leaves and reeds) are arranged in a pleasing, repeating pattern. Use a deep indigo and sapphire blue color palette transitioning into soft lavender and gold accents. The style should be ethereal and graphic, utilizing clean linework and strong color blocking suitable for seamless repeat printing on apparel. High contrast, symmetrical balance, centered subject matter.
